title: Kimi K3 is competitive with Fable; Kimi K3 + Fable is SoTA.
excerpt: Benchmarking over 1,000 agentic tasks demonstrates that routing between the open-source Kimi K3 model and the closed Fable 5 model creates a new state-of-the-art (SoTA) approach that surpasses the performance of either model alone. While both models perform competitively in general benchmarks, they possess distinct specializations—K3 excels in terminal, symbolic math, and dev tooling, whereas Fable leads in web, data visualization, and multi-language breadth. By architecting a router to leverage these specific strengths, teams can achieve a 93% task accuracy rate and up to 50x better cost-efficiency compared to using Fable in isolation, effectively proving that relying on a single model is no longer optimal.
content_html:
K3 is a frontier quality open model at a fraction of the cost. Even bigger is that it complements Fable predictably, which makes it possible to get the highest quality intelligence by routing tasks.


🧭 tl;dr: We ran Kimi K3 (open) against Fable 5 (closed) on ~1,000 agentic tasks finding:

  1. We achieved 93% accuracy with routing between K3 and Fable.
  2. Results were up to ~50X more cost effective than Fable alone on long agentic loops, and consistently lower cost across every use case.

How We Measured

We averaged benchmarks, each aimed at a different kind of work, and ran K3 and Fable 5 through the same harness. About 1,030 tasks in all, in real agent loops.

FamilyWhat it testsTasks
SWEReal repo bug-fixes (SWE-bench style)460
TerminalLong agentic ops: security, crypto, reverse-eng, sysadmin89
AlgorithmicLeetCode / AtCoder-style problems100
Multi-LanguageImplementation across six languages225
LegalA legal-agent benchmark (lawyer-graded tasks)120

One quick definition before we get into the results. Oracle routing is a method for measuring the best theoretical performance by running the task through each model and then picking the cheapest correct option (the cost/performance ceiling). In a practical router, you don’t get to run your task against multiple models. The router makes a prediction of which model has the best cost and quality trade off, but ultimately it’s a guess.

In this study, oracle routing demonstrated K3 is selected for 72-96% of tasks. This suggests a near-perfect router might be achievable, by learning the difference between day-to-day tasks and the true long tail of frontier work. It will require an order of magnitude more routing data, and real world performance to say definitively.

K3 is a good model.

From a 10,000 foot view, it can be easy to look at both models and call the head-to-head a tie. For example, if you look at SWE, the headline benchmark, K3 gets 92.4%, Fable 92.6%. Across the five types of tasks we benchmarked on, the two models tend to stay within a few points of each other, with Fable pulling slightly ahead on its coding-language breadth (Multi-lang).

It’s easy to stop there and say “they’re roughly even”. The news is that they have discretely better performance across different task types.

Two Models is Better than One

If you take a peek inside a single benchmark, there’s more to see than just a top-line accuracy number. Take SWE, where the two are dead even overall. If you split SWE by problem domain you can see where each model shines. K3 is sharpest on symbolic math and dev tooling; Fable wins on web & data visualization work. The same pattern runs through the multi-language set, where Fable's breadth carries Java, Python and C++, while K3 draws even on JavaScript and Rust.

For long-horizon work at a terminal, driving a shell and prodding at systems across dozens of turns, K3 showed its true colors. It cleared a batch of tasks Fable never cracked: a 7z hash, FEAL cryptanalysis, leaked secrets, a live vulnerability, runaway async jobs.

K3 can be up to 50x lower cost on Fireworks. 🫳🎤

While quality is a near-tie at a high level, price isn't close.

So where's this huge price gap coming from? token pricing, prompt caching, and effort-per-task. On SWE for example, K3 works much harder than Fable: roughly 55 turns and 1.3M tokens a task versus 21 turns and 130K. On the long terminal tasks it's the other way around: Fable is the one that spirals, running up 64 turns and 1.5M tokens (sometimes straight into a timeout).

Prompt caching does most of the work of turning that effort into K3's price advantage: even when K3 reads ten times the tokens, with cache hits that means that SWE runs still come in lower cost than Fable. There’s a tradeoff. Tasks with extra turns generally mean more wall-clock time per run i.e. slower runs. If you need an answer in two seconds, that matters; if you're running agents in the background at scale, a bill that's a fraction of the size matters a lot more.

Don't pick a model. Route.

If you send every task to whoever handles it best, you don't land somewhere between the two models, you land above both.

Per-task routing always out performs any single model run:

The oracle router choose K3, 72-96% of task traffic. By architecting a router this way, you end up with overall quality above either model alone at a cost close to just using just the cost-optimized one.

K3 is cost optimized on all work types

Put both quality and cost on one plot. K3 in blue lands to the left (the more cost-effective side) of Fable in red in all five task-families. Accuracy trades back and forth: Fable pulls ahead on multi-language, K3 on terminal and legal, the rest roughly level.

Single Models Are Wasteful and No Longer SoTA

Kimi K3 + Fable routed together unlocks their best qualities at the best price.

The single model provider, token maxxing days, are coming to an end. The task-level data says these models are specialists at very different prices. The best AI no longer comes out of a single lab, it’s a mixture of models.

What this means in practice:

  1. Open as the default. A 50x lower cost open model like K3 should be your base case, since the oracle sends it most of the traffic anyway.
  2. The router is your moat. A router must be tailored to your workload and learning that task/model split continuously is the best chance you’ll have at staying ahead.

sentences.en: It will require an order of magnitude more routing data, and real world performance to say definitively.
sentences.zh: 确切地说，这将需要更多的路由数据和现实世界的性能。

sentences.en: Note the y-axis for the tokens graph is task solve rate.
sentences.zh: 请注意，标记图的 y 轴是任务解决率。

blocks.html_en: Prompt caching does most of the work of turning that effort into K3's price advantage: even when K3 reads ten times the tokens, with cache hits that means that SWE runs still come in lower cost than Fable. There’s a tradeoff. Tasks with extra turns generally mean more wall-clock time per run i.e. slower runs. If you need an answer in two seconds, that matters; if you're running agents in the background at scale, a bill that's a fraction of the size matters a lot more.

sentences.en: Prompt caching does most of the work of turning that effort into K3's price advantage: even when K3 reads ten times the tokens, with cache hits that means that SWE runs still come in lower cost than Fable.
sentences.zh: 提示缓存完成了大部分工作，将这种努力转化为 K3 的价格优势：即使 K3 读取了十倍的令牌，缓存命中也意味着 SWE 的运行成本仍然低于 Fable。

sentences.en: There’s a tradeoff.
sentences.zh: 这是一个权衡。

sentences.en: Tasks with extra turns generally mean more wall-clock time per run i.e. slower runs.
sentences.zh: 额外回合的任务通常意味着每次运行需要更多的挂钟时间，即运行速度较慢。

sentences.en: If you need an answer in two seconds, that matters; if you're running agents in the background at scale, a bill that's a fraction of the size matters a lot more.
sentences.zh: 如果您需要在两秒钟内得到答案，那很重要；如果您在后台大规模运行代理，那么规模的一小部分的账单就更重要。

blocks.html_en: Don't pick a model. Route.

sentences.en: Don't pick a model.
sentences.zh: 不要选型号。

sentences.en: Route.
sentences.zh: 路线。

blocks.html_en: If you send every task to whoever handles it best, you don't land somewhere between the two models, you land above both.

sentences.en: If you send every task to whoever handles it best, you don't land somewhere between the two models, you land above both.
sentences.zh: 如果你把每项任务都交给最能处理它的人，你就不会落在这两个模型之间，而是落在这两个模型之上。

blocks.html_en: Per-task routing always out performs any single model run:

sentences.en: Per-task routing always out performs any single model run:
sentences.zh: 每任务路由始终胜过任何单个模型运行：

blocks.html_en: <figcaption>Fig 6 · Per-task oracle routing vs each model alone. Green tags = points gained over the best single model in that category.</figcaption>

sentences.en: Fig 6 · Per-task oracle routing vs each model alone.
sentences.zh: 图 6 · 每任务预言机路由与单独的每个模型。

sentences.en: Green tags = points gained over the best single model in that category.
sentences.zh: 绿色标签=相对于该类别中最好的单一模型获得的分数。

blocks.html_en: The oracle router choose K3, 72-96% of task traffic. By architecting a router this way, you end up with overall quality above either model alone at a cost close to just using just the cost-optimized one.

sentences.en: The oracle router choose K3, 72-96% of task traffic.
sentences.zh: oracle路由器选择K3，任务流量的72-96%。

sentences.en: By architecting a router this way, you end up with overall quality above either model alone at a cost close to just using just the cost-optimized one.
sentences.zh: 通过以这种方式构建路由器，您最终获得的整体质量优于单独使用任一型号的路由器，而成本接近于仅使用成本优化的型号。

blocks.html_en: <figcaption>Fig 7 · Where an oracle router sends each task. A strong, cost optimized model like K3 becomes the default; the premium model is the exception, not the rule.</figcaption>

sentences.en: Fig 7 · Where an oracle router sends each task.
sentences.zh: 图 7 · Oracle 路由器发送每个任务的位置。

sentences.en: A strong, cost optimized model like K3 becomes the default; the premium model is the exception, not the rule.
sentences.zh: 像 K3 这样强大的、成本优化的型号成为默认型号；高级型号是例外，而不是规则。

blocks.html_en: K3 is cost optimized on all work types

sentences.en: K3 is cost optimized on all work types
sentences.zh: K3 针对所有工作类型进行了成本优化

blocks.html_en: Put both quality and cost on one plot. K3 in blue lands to the left (the more cost-effective side) of Fable in red in all five task-families. Accuracy trades back and forth: Fable pulls ahead on multi-language, K3 on terminal and legal, the rest roughly level.

sentences.en: Put both quality and cost on one plot.
sentences.zh: 将质量和成本放在一块地块上。

sentences.en: K3 in blue lands to the left (the more cost-effective side) of Fable in red in all five task-families.
sentences.zh: 在所有五个任务系列中，蓝色的 K3 位于红色寓言的左侧（更具成本效益的一侧）。

sentences.en: Accuracy trades back and forth: Fable pulls ahead on multi-language, K3 on terminal and legal, the rest roughly level.
sentences.zh: 准确性来回变化：《神鬼寓言》在多语言方面领先，K3 在终端和合法方面领先，其余部分大致持平。

blocks.html_en: <figcaption>Fig 8 · Cost (log scale) vs. accuracy for each family. K3 is left of Fable, lower cost in all five. The vertical gaps show which model is stronger where.</figcaption>

sentences.en: Fig 8 · Cost (log scale) vs. accuracy for each family.
sentences.zh: 图 8 · 每个系列的成本（对数标度）与准确度。

sentences.en: K3 is left of Fable, lower cost in all five.
sentences.zh: K3 是《神鬼寓言》的左边，在所有五个中成本较低。

sentences.en: The vertical gaps show which model is stronger where.
sentences.zh: 垂直差距显示哪个模型在哪里更强。

blocks.html_en: Single Models Are Wasteful and No Longer SoTA

sentences.en: Single Models Are Wasteful and No Longer SoTA
sentences.zh: 单一模型很浪费，不再是 SoTA

blocks.html_en: Kimi K3 + Fable routed together unlocks their best qualities at the best price.

sentences.en: Kimi K3 + Fable routed together unlocks their best qualities at the best price.
sentences.zh: Kimi K3 + 《神鬼寓言》的组合以最优惠的价格释放了它们的最佳品质。

blocks.html_en: The single model provider, token maxxing days, are coming to an end. The task-level data says these models are specialists at very different prices. The best AI no longer comes out of a single lab, it’s a mixture of models.

sentences.en: The single model provider, token maxxing days, are coming to an end.
sentences.zh: 单一模型提供商、token maxxing 时代即将结束。

sentences.en: The task-level data says these models are specialists at very different prices.
sentences.zh: 任务级数据表明，这些模型都是专家，但价格却截然不同。

sentences.en: The best AI no longer comes out of a single lab, it’s a mixture of models.
sentences.zh: 最好的人工智能不再来自单个实验室，而是模型的混合体。

blocks.html_en: What this means in practice:

sentences.en: What this means in practice:
sentences.zh: 这在实践中意味着什么：

blocks.html_en: • Open as the default. A 50x lower cost open model like K3 should be your base case, since the oracle sends it most of the traffic anyway.

sentences.en: Open as the default.
sentences.zh: 默认打开。

sentences.en: A 50x lower cost open model like K3 should be your base case, since the oracle sends it most of the traffic anyway.
sentences.zh: 像 K3 这样成本低 50 倍的开放模型应该是您的基本案例，因为无论如何，预言机都会向其发送大部分流量。

blocks.html_en: • The router is your moat. A router must be tailored to your workload and learning that task/model split continuously is the best chance you’ll have at staying ahead.

sentences.en: The router is your moat.
sentences.zh: 路由器是你的护城河。

sentences.en: A router must be tailored to your workload and learning that task/model split continuously is the best chance you’ll have at staying ahead.
sentences.zh: 路由器必须根据您的工作负载进行定制，并且了解任务/模型的连续拆分是您保持领先的最佳机会。

content_html_zh:
K3 是一款前沿品质的开放式型号，但成本仅为其一小部分。 更重要的是，它可预测地补充了《神鬼寓言》，这使得通过路由任务获得最高质量的情报成为可能。

🧭 tl;dr：我们在约 1,000 个代理任务上运行 Kimi K3（开放）与 Fable 5（封闭），结果发现：

  1. 我们在 K3 和 Fable 之间的路由实现了 93% 的准确率。
  2. 在长代理循环上，结果比单独使用 Fable 的成本效益高出约 50 倍，并且每个用例的成本始终较低。

我们如何衡量

我们对基准进行了平均，每个基准针对不同类型的工作，并通过相同的工具运行 K3 和 Fable 5。 真实代理循环中总共约有 1,030 个任务。

家庭它测试什么Tasks
SWE真正的回购错误修复（SWE-bench 风格）460
终端长代理操作：安全、加密、反向工程、系统管理员89
算法LeetCode / AtCoder 风格的问题100
多语言跨六种语言的实施225
Legal法律代理人基准（律师分级任务）120

在我们讨论结果之前，先简单定义一下。 Oracle 路由是一种通过每个模型运行任务然后选择最便宜的正确选项（成本/性能上限）来衡量最佳理论性能的方法。 在实际的路由器中，您无法针对多个模型运行任务。 路由器会预测哪种模型具有最佳的成本和质量权衡，但最终这只是一个猜测。

在本研究中，预言机路由证明 K3 被选择用于 72-96% 的任务。 这表明，通过了解日常任务和前沿工作的真正长尾之间的差异，可能可以实现近乎完美的路由器。 确切地说，这将需要更多的路由数据和现实世界的性能。

K3是一个不错的型号。

从 10,000 英尺的高度来看，很容易看到这两个模型并认为它们势均力敌。 例如，如果你看一下头条基准 SWE，K3 获得 92.4%，Fable 获得 92.6%。 在我们进行基准测试的五种类型的任务中，这两个模型往往彼此相差几个点，其中 Fable 在编码语言广度（多语言）方面稍稍领先。

很容易就到此为止并说“它们大致相等”。 消息是，它们在不同的任务类型上都有明显更好的表现。

两种模型优于一种模型

如果您查看单个基准测试，您会发现不仅仅是最重要的准确度数字。 以 SWE 为例，两者总体上都已经死了。 如果您按问题领域划分 SWE，您可以看到每个模型的闪光点。 K3 在符号数学和开发工具方面最为敏锐； 《寓言》在网络和数据可视化工作上获胜。 同样的模式也贯穿于多语言系列，其中《Fable》的广度涵盖了 Java、Python 和 C++，而 K3 甚至还借鉴了 JavaScript 和 Rust。

对于码头的长视距工作、驾驶炮弹并在系统上进行数十个转弯的刺探，K3 展现了它的真面目。 它清除了一批《神鬼寓言》从未破解的任务：7z 哈希、FEAL 密码分析、泄露的秘密、实时漏洞、失控的异步作业。

K3 在 Fireworks 上的成本最多可降低 50 倍。 🫳🎤

虽然质量接近高水平，但价格却相差甚远。

那么如此巨大的价差从何而来？ 令牌定价、提示缓存和每项任务的工作量。 例如，在 SWE 上，K3 比《神鬼寓言》要努力得多：一个任务大约需要 55 个回合和 130 万个代币，而一项任务则需要 21 个回合和 130K。 在长终端任务中则相反：《神鬼寓言》是螺旋式上升的任务，运行 64 回合和 150 万个代币（有时直接超时）。

提示缓存完成了大部分工作，将这种努力转化为 K3 的价格优势：即使 K3 读取了十倍的令牌，缓存命中也意味着 SWE 的运行成本仍然低于 Fable。 这是一个权衡。 额外回合的任务通常意味着每次运行需要更多的挂钟时间，即运行速度较慢。 如果您需要在两秒钟内得到答案，那很重要；如果您在后台大规模运行代理，那么规模的一小部分的账单就更重要。

不要选型号。 路线。

如果你把每项任务都交给最能处理它的人，你就不会落在这两个模型之间，而是落在这两个模型之上。

每任务路由始终胜过任何单个模型运行：

oracle路由器选择K3，任务流量的72-96%。 通过以这种方式构建路由器，您最终获得的整体质量优于单独使用任一型号的路由器，而成本接近于仅使用成本优化的型号。

K3 针对所有工作类型进行了成本优化

将质量和成本放在一块地块上。 在所有五个任务系列中，蓝色的 K3 位于红色寓言的左侧（更具成本效益的一侧）。 准确性来回变化：《神鬼寓言》在多语言方面领先，K3 在终端和合法方面领先，其余部分大致持平。

单一模型很浪费，不再是 SoTA

Kimi K3 + 《神鬼寓言》的组合以最优惠的价格释放了它们的最佳品质。

单一模型提供商、token maxxing 时代即将结束。 任务级数据表明，这些模型都是专家，但价格却截然不同。 最好的人工智能不再来自单个实验室，而是模型的混合体。

这在实践中意味着什么：

  1. 默认打开。 像 K3 这样成本低 50 倍的开放模型应该是您的基本案例，因为无论如何，预言机都会向其发送大部分流量。
  2. 路由器是你的护城河。 路由器必须根据您的工作负载进行定制，并且了解任务/模型的连续拆分是您保持领先的最佳机会。
